commit.message: Remove ghost deployment and update icon picker to include new icons.
Deploy fetchjs to GitHub Pages
Deploy nextjs to GitHub Pages
Deploy nextjs to GitHub Pages
Deploy nextjs to GitHub Pages
Deploy nextjs to GitHub Pages
Deploy nextjs to GitHub Pages
Deploy nextjs to GitHub Pages
Deploy nextjs to GitHub Pages
Deploy nextjs to GitHub Pages
Deploy nextjs to GitHub Pages
Deploy nextjs to GitHub Pages
Deploy nextjs to GitHub Pages

Add ghost drag placeholders for blocks and pages, section move buttons

- Replace border-line drop indicators with dashed ghost placeholders that
  follow the cursor, fixing drops in empty space above/below items
- Block drag: container-level dragover calculates insertion index from
  mouse Y, ghost shows block type label at target position
- Page drag: same ghost approach per section page list, cross-section
  drops preserve insertion position
- Add ↑/↓ buttons to section headers (visible on hover) to reorder sections

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add copy/move block to another page, fix untitled pages, auto-generate missing slugs

- Add transfer button (⇄) to block header, visible on hover like other controls
- Transfer dialog lets user copy or move any block to another page
- Copy generates a new block ID; move removes block from current page after transfer
- Pages with no title now display as 'Untitled' in the sidebar
- Pages saved with no slug get an auto-generated 8-char slug with a toast notification

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Deploy nextjs to GitHub Pages
Deploy nextjs to GitHub Pages

Add quiz media support, image loading shimmer, and fix hljs loading

Quiz block:
- Add per-question media field (plain text, code, or image) shown below
  the question text and above options, with a separator
- Plain text renders as a non-bold paragraph
- Code supports JavaScript and Python with hljs syntax highlighting
- Image supports upload or URL with alt text
- Fix hljs loading to also trigger when quiz questions have code media

Image block:
- Add shimmer skeleton animation while image loads
- Fade in image on load; dismiss shimmer on error too

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Deploy nextjs to GitHub Pages

Update README with correct name, all block types, and deployment docs

- Fix expansion: LCMS is Learning Content Management System, not Local
- Add Difficulty and Fill in the Blank blocks
- Group blocks by category (Content, Media, Interactive, Structure)
- Add Deployment section covering nginx and GitHub Pages

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Deploy james to GitHub Pages

Update changes across client, content, and generator

- Modified ThemeView component
- Updated site configurations and pages
- Added new site content directories

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add commit message input to GitHub Pages deploy dialog

Users can now enter a custom git commit message when deploying to
GitHub Pages. Defaults to "Deploy {slug} to GitHub Pages" if left blank.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Deploy demo to GitHub Pages

Default exported sites to light mode

Previously fell back to prefers-color-scheme, now defaults to light.
User's manual toggle preference is still persisted via localStorage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

DDR: time nodes show limb colour, slower speed, dual label

- Time nodes now use the required limb colour (not fixed teal) so the
  player must move the correct limb — identified by colour and short
  name shown above '+10s' tag
- White border still distinguishes them as time nodes
- Speed reduced from 18 → 14 px/frame

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

DDR: time-bonus node every 10s, extend round to 2 minutes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

DDR: replace score-window bonus with fast time-bonus node

- Removed the score-within-window time bonus system
- Added time-bonus node: spawns occasionally (~1.2% chance per tick),
  falls at 18 px/frame, displays '+10s' in teal with white border
- Hitting it (PERFECT or GOOD window) adds 10 seconds to the timer
  and shows a '+10s!' popup; missing it has no penalty

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

DDR: add elbow tracking, time bonus system, fix real-time timer

- Arms now average elbow + wrist x position (like legs average knee +
  ankle) — elbows highlighted in matching red/blue in skeleton overlay
- Score TIME_BONUS_POINTS (300) within TIME_BONUS_WINDOW (15s) to earn
  +TIME_BONUS_ADD (8) seconds added to the countdown; shows popup
- Fixed timer to use real delta time (clock.tick return value) so
  slow frames on RPi no longer stretch the 60-second round

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

DDR: use knee+ankle average for legs, add time-based speed ramp

- Left/Right Leg tracking now averages knee and ankle x positions,
  giving a more stable and forgiving detection when legs are spread
- Left/Right Ankle keypoints highlighted in skeleton overlay (same
  colour as their corresponding leg)
- Node speed increases by 0.6 px/frame every 20 seconds regardless
  of score, shown in HUD as "Speed Lv N"

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add skeleton overlay and bomb cooldown UI to Fruit Ninja

Fruit_Ninja_Hailo.py (standalone):
- Extracts all 17 COCO keypoints per player in the pose callback
- draw_skeleton_overlay() renders a semi-transparent skeleton over the
  game frame, with wrists highlighted in each player's blade colour
- draw_bomb_cooldowns() shows a depleting bar + "FROZEN Xs" label
  below each player's face thumbnail during bomb timeout

pygame_fruit_ninja.py (multi-process version):
- Added skeleton_queue (mp.Queue) for IPC between callback and game
- Receives per-person keypoints and draws COCO-17 skeleton overlay
- Wrist joints highlighted in cyan to match hand tracking dots

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Replace health system with 60-second time attack mode

- Game is now a 1-minute score attack: timer counts down, game ends
  when it hits zero
- Missing notes only breaks combo, no other penalty
- Timer displayed top-right in large font, turns red below 10 seconds

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Replace discrete lives with health bar, add full skeleton overlay

- Lives system replaced with a time-draining health bar: health
  passively drains over time, misses penalise, hits/perfects restore
- Full COCO-17 skeleton is now rendered semi-transparently over the
  game frame so the player can see their body relative to the columns
- Health bar displayed top-right with green→yellow→red colour gradient

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add skeleton tracking overlay and limb position guides to DDR

- PiP frame now shows COCO-17 skeleton lines and keypoint dots, with
  wrists and knees highlighted in their respective limb colours
- Game frame shows a semi-transparent vertical guide line at each
  limb's exact x position, plus a downward arrow at the hit line

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add Dance Dance Revolution Hailo game

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Require user to activate Hailo env before launching games

Launcher scripts no longer source setup_env.sh automatically.
Instead they check for an active virtualenv (VIRTUAL_ENV) and
print a clear error with the exact source command to run if the
environment hasn't been set up yet.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add Space Invaders and standalone Fruit Ninja games

- Add community_projects/space_invaders/ — multiplayer 3D Space Invaders
  controlled by Hailo pose estimation (head movement steers ship), with
  keyboard/mouse fallback when no Hailo hardware is present
- Add community_projects/fruit_ninja/Fruit_Ninja_Hailo.py — self-contained
  single-file Fruit Ninja variant with automatic mouse fallback
- Add play_fruit_ninja.sh and play_space_invaders.sh launcher scripts
- Update community_projects.md with entries for both new games

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Fix file upload issues, add github link, fix state updates when new files are added, removed versioning.
Fixed paragraph tags with extra spacing at the bottom when inside of an alert.
Moved all relevant files for components into single folders.
Updated alert styles to be softer.
Fixed git activity with new shortcode for alerts.
Updated build.
Quiz answers are now selected and requiring submitting to reduce misclick errors.
Added documentation for the quiz system.
Updated test quiz to contain git questions.
Updated build.
Added ClaudeAI generated quiz system.
Added README.
Fixed potential evaluation bug (unexpected token). Added VSCode theme to settings.
Fix last line smart indenting when it shouldnt.
Fixed code being removable in read-only mode.
Added teacher task description and read-only mode to teacher settings.
The space below the last code editor line in line locking mode is now darkened.
Added experimental teacher feature: You can now make code readonly and configure editable lines. This is exported with the sharable link.

Moved clear buttons to their respective text areas, moved the share button to the header, and moved the layout button to the settings. Smart indenting has also been fixed so it works even if auto-close brackets is disabled.
Added smart indenting and section headings in settings.
Fixed shift-tab not removing indentation and line numbers being highlighted when code editor is not focused.
Fixed trailing spaces in logging and added separate colors for each log type.

Added line numbers, auto bracket closing, settings popup and persistant storage for line numbers, auto bracket closing and layout. Also fixed fragments not being parsed when trying to load a shared link on an already open page.
Fixed console not being printed to output in callback functions.
Code editor and output console can now be switched between vertical and horizontal views. They can now also be resized.
Alert is now closable, moved sharable link to popup and renamed the header.
Try fix hyperlinks again...
Added site url to attempt to fix hyperlinks for github pages deployments.
Added extra margin below alerts and updated build.
Updated build.
Added live preview installation guide.
Update build.
Added debug page for custom markdown components.
Removed unused background color and changed alert type to info for instructions.
Improved styling to alerts and added markdown support for alert content.
Added mkdoc hook to add custom alert markdown component.
Remove branching strategy diagram and updated build.
Updated build.
Generated new build.
Improve readability.
Added braching strategy files.
Update build.

Merge pull request #1 from Digital-Initiatives-Kangan-Institute/staging

Added branching strategy diagram.
